questions.q: Which actor, known for roles in 'Stranger Things' and 'Power Rangers', is hosting an AMA on Reddit today, April 7, 2026, to promote his new horror film 'Faces of Death'?
questions.correctText: Dacre Montgomery is hosting an AMA on Reddit today, April 7, 2026.

questions.q: Sony Pictures Entertainment announced a massive reorganization today, April 7, 2026, leading to layoffs across which divisions?
questions.correctText: Sony Pictures Entertainment announced layoffs across its film, television, and corporate divisions.

questions.q: What was a key development reported today, April 7, 2026, regarding the Michael Jackson biopic 'Michael', involving a significant cost in reshoots?
questions.correctText: The Michael Jackson biopic underwent $10-15 million in reshoots to remove scenes depicting child abuse allegations.

questions.q: Which director's new A24 film, starring Seth Rogen, Penélope Cruz, and Edward Norton, had its official trailer released today, April 7, 2026, for a movie titled 'The Invite'?
questions.correctText: Olivia Wilde's new A24 film 'The Invite' had its official trailer released today, April 7, 2026.

questions.q: What new movie trailer for a superhero film was revealed today, April 7, 2026, and discussed by a Kansas City comic store owner?
questions.correctText: The new movie trailer for 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' was revealed today, April 7, 2026.
